steps.title: Contrast origin and outcome
steps.content: Chen says his ambitions for the website were not very lofty, but the next sentence says the site became an essential resource. The transition must mark that surprising contrast.

steps.title: Use a despite-that transition
steps.content: B would make the site's importance a logical result of low ambition, C would add a similar point, and D would suggest sequence. A concessive transition captures the unexpected high-impact outcome. The answer is A.
